rationale: Top-of-form widget for the domestic corporation being amended (the entity-name appears in the title block, left of the SOS attest box).

label_verbatim: FIRST: The text of each amendment approved by the court is set forth in Exhibit ___ attached and made a part hereof.
rationale: Inline single-letter blank for the exhibit referenced in FIRST. Same pattern as merger.plan_exhibit_letter / conversion.new_entity_provisions_exhibit_letter (see schema-gaps/2026-04-30-phase2-summary.md).

label_verbatim: FIRST: ...the date of the court's order or decree approving these Articles of Amendment is ___
rationale: Date of the court order/decree authorizing the amendment. Distinct from filing.date_signed (which is when the court-designated individual signed this form).

label_verbatim: SECOND: The title of the reorganization proceeding in which the order or decree was entered:
rationale: Full caption/title of the reorganization proceeding (e.g., 'In re XYZ Corp., Case No. 24-12345-AB, U.S. Bankruptcy Court for the District of Maine'). Single-line widget — case number, court, and title may all collapse into this single field.
Date this filing was signed by the court-designated individual(s). One DATED widget covers both signer slots.

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature of individual designated by the court) / (type or print name and capacity) [first signer]
rationale: Combined name+capacity for the first court-designated signer. Shape D per schema-gaps/2026-04-30-filing-signer-shape.md. Capacity here is typically 'Court-Designated Individual' or 'Trustee in Bankruptcy', not a corporate office.

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature of individual designated by the court) / (type or print name and capacity) [second signer]
rationale: Combined name+capacity for the second court-designated signer. The court may designate one or two individuals; the second slot is optional. Same Shape D as the first signer; key differentiated only by suffix '_2'.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1 (cover-letter primitive). Should mirror entity.name.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

rationale: Total fees ($50 base per page-0 fee header, plus expedite premium).

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
label_verbatim: Contact email address for this filing

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: Email address to use for annual report reminders
